title: Audience Participation Game
genericDescription: Design for spectators, co-creators, or public participants; manage consent and authorship; support repeatable facilitation.
specificDescription: Build a game intended for a classroom, gallery, livestream, museum, Discord, or workshop context. Include facilitator instructions and a consent or participation protocol.
gradingRubric: 30 pts participation design; 20 pts facilitation readiness; 20 pts track relevance; 15 pts consent/authorship handling; 15 pts documentation.
